mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ATND_CNT, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY), '%Y/%m/%d') AS ATND_DATE FROM QUEST_LOGS Q WHERE Q.QUEST_SN = 2 AND Q.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND Q.REQ_DATE >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY) AND Q.REQ_DATE < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) - 2 DAY)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS QEST_CNT, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) + 6 DAY), '%Y/%m/%d') AS FROM_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) + 0 DAY), '%Y/%m/%d') AS TO_DATE FROM QUEST_LOGS Q WHERE Q.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND Q.REQ_DATE >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) + 6 DAY) AND Q.REQ_DATE < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY)

SELECT SUM(AMOUNT) AS POINT, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) + 6 DAY), '%Y/%m/%d') AS FROM_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) + 0 DAY), '%Y/%m/%d') AS TO_DATE FROM MBER_REWARD_LOGS WHERE REWARD_TYPE = 'POINT' AND CREAT_DE >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) + 6 DAY) AND CREAT_DE < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY)
SELECT SUM(AMOUNT) AS POINT FROM MBER_REWARD_LOGS WHERE REWARD_TYPE = 'POINT'

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(TARGET_DATES.TARGET_SUNDAY, '%m/%d') AS ATND_DATE, COUNT(Q.QUEST_SN) AS ATND_CNT FROM (SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY), INTERVAL D.DIFF DAY) AS TARGET_SUNDAY FROM (SELECT 0 AS DIFF UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 14 UNION ALL SELECT 21 UNION ALL SELECT 28) D) TARGET_DATES LEFT JOIN QUEST_LOGS Q ON Q.QUEST_SN = 2 AND Q.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND Q.REQ_DATE >= TARGET_DATES.TARGET_SUNDAY AND Q.REQ_DATE < DATE_ADD(TARGET_DATES.TARGET_SUNDAY, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY TARGET_DATES.TARGET_SUNDAY ORDER BY TARGET_DATES.TARGET_SUNDAY ASC

SELECT LVL_GROUPS.LVL_NAME AS LEVEL_GROUP, COUNT(A.LEVEL) AS USER_CNT FROM (SELECT 1 AS ORD, 'Lv.1~10' AS LVL_NAME, 1 AS MIN_LVL, 10 AS MAX_LVL UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'Lv.11~20', 11, 20 UNION ALL SELECT 3, 'Lv.21~30', 21, 30 UNION ALL SELECT 4, 'Lv.31~40', 31, 40 UNION ALL SELECT 5, 'Lv.41+', 41, 9999 -- 최대 레벨 상한선 (임의 지정) ) LVL_GROUPS LEFT JOIN AVATAR_INFO A ON A.LEVEL >= LVL_GROUPS.MIN_LVL AND A.LEVEL <= LVL_GROUPS.MAX_LVL AND A.MBER_SN IN (SELECT MBER_SN FROM MBER_INFO WHERE USE_AT = 'Y') GROUP BY LVL_GROUPS.ORD, LVL_GROUPS.LVL_NAME ORDER BY LVL_GROUPS.ORD ASC

SELECT TIME_GROUPS.TIME_LABEL AS TIME_LABEL, COUNT(V.CREAT_DE) AS VISIT_CNT FROM (SELECT 1 AS ORD, '09시' AS TIME_LABEL, 9 AS START_H, 10 AS END_H UNION ALL SELECT 2, '11시', 11, 12 UNION ALL SELECT 3, '13시', 13, 14 UNION ALL SELECT 4, '15시', 15, 16 UNION ALL SELECT 5, '17시', 17, 18 UNION ALL SELECT 6, '19시', 19, 20 UNION ALL SELECT 7, '21시', 21, 22 UNION ALL SELECT 8, '23시', 23, 23) TIME_GROUPS LEFT JOIN VISIT_LOG V ON HOUR(V.CREAT_DE) >= TIME_GROUPS.START_H AND HOUR(V.CREAT_DE) <= TIME_GROUPS.END_H AND V.creat_de >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) + 6 DAY) AND V.creat_de < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY) GROUP BY TIME_GROUPS.ORD, TIME_GROUPS.TIME_LABEL ORDER BY TIME_GROUPS.ORD ASC

SELECT FIXED_CLASSES.GRADE, FIXED_CLASSES.CLA, COUNT(T.MBER_SN) AS ATND_CNT FROM (SELECT 4 AS GRADE, 1 AS CLA UNION ALL SELECT 4, 2 UNION ALL SELECT 4, 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4, 4 UNION ALL SELECT 4, 5 UNION ALL SELECT 4, 6 UNION ALL SELECT 5, 1 UNION ALL SELECT 5, 2 UNION ALL SELECT 5, 3 UNION ALL SELECT 5, 4 UNION ALL SELECT 6, 1 UNION ALL SELECT 6, 2 UNION ALL SELECT 6, 3 UNION ALL SELECT 6, 4 UNION ALL SELECT 6, 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6, 6) FIXED_CLASSES LEFT JOIN (SELECT Y.GRADE, Y.CLA, Q.MBER_SN FROM QUEST_LOGS Q JOIN GUILD_MBER_LIST X ON Q.MBER_SN = X.MBER_SN JOIN GUILD_INFO Y ON X.GUILD_SN = Y.GUILD_SN WHERE Q.QUEST_SN = 2 AND Q.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND Q.REQ_DATE >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY) AND Q.REQ_DATE < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) - 2 DAY)) T ON FIXED_CLASSES.GRADE = T.GRADE AND FIXED_CLASSES.CLA = T.CLA GROUP BY FIXED_CLASSES.GRADE, FIXED_CLASSES.CLA ORDER BY FIXED_CLASSES.GRADE ASC, FIXED_CLASSES.CLA ASC

SELECT Y.MBER_NM, X.NCNM, FN_GET_CODE_NM('OCCP', X.OCCP_CODE) as OCCP_NM, X.EXP, X.POINT, X.LEVEL FROM AVATAR_INFO X LEFT JOIN MBER_INFO Y ON X.MBER_SN = Y.MBER_SN AND Y.USE_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY EXP DESC LIMIT 3
